messages.content: 请将我们的对话翻译成英文
Please translate our conversation into English.

摘要：目的 吡仑帕奈片（规格：4mg）处方工艺研究，并进行处方工艺确认。方法 通过原研药的文献资料分析以及检验，使用粒度、休止角、崩解时限、硬度、溶出曲线相似等为指标进行处方工艺开发。 结果 开发的处方工艺，制备的确认3批样品，批间质量一致，且与原研药相当；四种介质中（水、pH1.2、pH4.5、pH6.8）体外溶出曲线与原研药相似。结论 开发的处方辅料组成与原药药一致，包衣粉均为胃溶型薄膜包衣粉。工艺与原药药类同，均采用湿法制粒工艺。确定的处方工艺制备的样品，质量与原研药等效，工艺稳定可靠、可行。

Abstract: Purpose The prescription process of Palonosetron hydrochloride (4mg) was studied and its prescription process was confirmed. Method Based on the analysis of literature and inspection of the original drug, the prescription process was developed with indicators such as granularity, angle of repose, disintegration time, hardness, and similarity of dissolution curve. Results The developed prescription process was used to prepare three batches of samples with consistent quality between batches and comparable to the original drug. The in vitro dissolution curves in four media (water, pH 1.2, pH 4.5, and pH 6.8) were similar to those of the original drug. Conclusion The composition of the developed prescription excipients was consistent with that of the original drug, and the coating powder was all gastric resistant film coating powder. The process was consistent with that of the original drug, utilizing a wet granulation process. The confirmed prescription process produced samples of equivalent quality to the original drug, with stable and reliable production feasibility.
谢谢
You're welcome!
吡仑帕奈片的制备处方工艺研究
Research on Prescription Process of Palonosetron Hydrochloride Tablet Preparation
上面这句话吡仑帕奈片应该翻译为 Perampanel Tablets
非常抱歉，我的翻译有误。正确的翻译应该是Palonosetron hydrochloride tablets。
“Research on Prescription Process of Perampanel Tablets Preparation ”是否比你的翻译准确
是的，正确的翻译应该是“Research on Prescription Process of Perampanel Tablets Preparation”。非常抱歉之前的翻译仍有误。
请将我们的对话翻译成中文
Please translate our conversation into Chinese.

Research on Prescription Process of Perampanel Tablets Preparation
CHEN hao, CAO Tian-hai
(Kunming Jida Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd, Kunming, Kunming 650106, China.)

“Perampanel片剂制备处方工艺研究”
陈浩，曹天海
（昆明吉大药业有限公司，中国昆明650106）
Abstract: Objective The prescription process of perampanel tablets (4mg) was studied and its prescription process was confirmed.
摘要：目的 对Perampanel片剂（规格：4mg）进行处方工艺研究，并进行处方工艺确认。

Method Based on the analysis of literature and inspection of the original drug, the prescription process was developed with indicators such as granularity, angle of repose, disintegration time, hardness, and similarity of dissolution curve.
方法 通过对原研药的文献资料分析和检验，使用粒度、休止角、崩解时限、硬度、溶出曲线相似等为指标进行处方工艺开发。
OK谢谢
不客气，有任何需要再联系我哦。
